mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, patient_id, encounter_id, session_id, template_id, report_no, status, current_version, signed_by, signed_at, signature_data, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM report WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report ( tenant_id, patient_id, encounter_id, session_id, template_id, report_no, status, current_version, signed_by, signed_at, signature_data, created_by ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{patientId}, #{encounterId}, #{sessionId}, #{templateId}, #{reportNo}, #{status}, #{currentVersion}, #{signedBy}, #{signedAt}, #{signatureData, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET patient_id = #{patientId}, encounter_id = #{encounterId}, session_id = #{sessionId}, template_id = #{templateId}, report_no = #{reportNo}, status = #{status}, current_version = #{currentVersion}, signed_by = #{signedBy}, signed_at = #{signedAt}, signature_data = #{signatureData, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, created_by = #{createdBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
